initiatives.name: Texas Civil Rights Project
initiatives.description: A legal advocacy organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through civil rights litigation and community organizing across Texas. They coordinate legal support, advocacy campaigns, and solidarity networks while building power through constitutional rights defense and creating systemic change.

initiatives.name: La Union del Pueblo Entero (LUPE)
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and solidarity through immigrant and worker community organizing across Texas. They coordinate direct support, advocacy campaigns, and solidarity networks while building power through community leadership development and creating spaces for collective action.

initiatives.name: TX Abolitionists
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity through prison abolition organizing across Texas. They coordinate direct support, advocacy campaigns, and solidarity networks while building power through community education, direct action, and creating spaces for abolition movement building.

initiatives.name: Harm Reduction TX
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective providing harm reduction services and mutual aid support across Texas. They coordinate direct support, supply distribution, and community care while building power through harm reduction education, peer outreach, and creating spaces for health justice and community wellbeing.

initiatives.name: Trans Texas
initiatives.description: A trans-led mutual aid network providing direct support and solidarity for transgender and gender non-conforming communities across Texas. They coordinate emergency assistance, resource distribution, and community care initiatives while building power through trans liberation organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Estok' Gna
initiatives.description: An Indigenous-led collective fostering mutual aid and solidarity through cultural preservation and land defense in Texas. They coordinate community support, traditional knowledge sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through Indigenous sovereignty and creating pathways for cultural resurgence and land reclamation.

initiatives.name: Texas for Sudan
initiatives.description: Texas for Sudan, dedicated to amplifying Sudanese voices and participation in events centered around Sudanese liberation efforts in Texas.

initiatives.name: Texas Equal Access Fund
initiatives.description: We're here to help Texans access abortion care by helping them pay for it.

initiatives.name: Jane's Due Process
initiatives.description: We help TX teens get abortions & birth control.

initiatives.name: Woori Juntos
initiatives.description: Grassroots-based organization empowering impacted Asian and immigrant Texans through culturally competent service, organizing, & advocacy

initiatives.name: Faith in TX
initiatives.description: Faith in TX organizes and builds power with "the people" so that we "the people" will have greater access to the power to govern our shared society.
